response.text:
The flow uses HIRes to improve effective vertical resolution, 100 ns/div to show about one 1 MHz period clearly, a 10 kpoint record as a conservative starting balance of time span and sample density, FastFrame off to avoid segmented-capture side effects, a CH1 rising-edge trigger for stability, and readback queries so the actual sample rate and final settings are verified instead of assumed.
